name: Iñigo Zabaleta-Vidal
summary: Strategic Engineering Manager with over 10 years of experience leading high-performing distributed teams in the fintech sector. Proven track record in scaling cloud infrastructure and fostering engineering excellence through mentorship and agile transformation.

experience.title: Engineering Manager
experience.description: Lead a cross-functional team of 15 engineers building scalable payment processing APIs. Successfully migrated legacy monolith to microservices architecture, reducing system latency by 40 percent.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Architected cloud-native solutions for enterprise clients using AWS and Kubernetes. Mentored junior developers and implemented CI/CD pipelines that improved deployment frequency by 300 percent.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: Developed full-stack web applications using React and Node.js. Collaborated with product managers to define technical requirements and ensure timely delivery of feature releases.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Engineering
Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering
